filesystem.description: Read, write, search, and manage files and directories

git.description: Git version control operations (commits, branches, diffs, etc.)

fetch._comment: sandbox: false because srt's network sandbox (seccomp/bubblewrap) blocks Unix domain sockets needed by tsx in dev mode and cannot selectively allow network while restricting filesystem. The policy engine handles URL-level security (SSRF blocking, domain allowlists) independently.

github.description: GitHub API operations (issues, pull requests, repos, search)

google-workspace.description: Google Workspace tools (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides)
google-workspace._comment: npm registry domains are needed for the initial npx -y install. To remove them, vendor the package as a local dependency instead.
